name: Oxytocin
description: Awọn homonu peptide ti o ni opin. Uterotonic laini akọkọ fun idena ati itọju ti iṣọn-ẹjẹ lẹhin ibimọ (PPH). O fa ihamọ uterine ati dinku isonu ẹjẹ lẹhin ibimọ. Fi fun LEHIN placental ifijiṣẹ.
indications: Idena ti iṣọn-ẹjẹ lẹhin ibimọ (itọju deede lẹhin ibimọ)
Itoju isun ẹjẹ lẹhin ibimọ (atony uterine)
dose: Idena PPH: Awọn ẹya 10 IM lẹsẹkẹsẹ lẹhin ifijiṣẹ placental (ọna aaye ti o fẹ). Itọju PPH: Awọn ẹya 10-40 ni 1L IV, fi sii ni 40-80 mU / min. Ti IV ko ba si: 10 sipo IM.
window: Fifunni LEHIN ifijiṣẹ ibi-ọmọ -- fifunni ṣaaju ifijiṣẹ ibi-ọmọ le dẹkun ibi-ọmọ.
contraindications: Ṣaaju ifijiṣẹ placental (le di pakute placenta)
Ibanujẹ oyun pẹlu ori ti a ko fi jiṣẹ
warnings: FÚN LẸ́YÌN TÍ A GBÌSÍṢẸ́ PLACENTA -- ìdẹkùn ibi-ọmọ jẹ ilolu ti o lewu.
IV bolus le fa haipatensonu nla ati arrhythmia ọkan ọkan - nigbagbogbo dilute ati fi sii laiyara.
Ipa antidiuretic pẹlu awọn iwọn nla - atẹle fun hyponatremia.

obstetric.note: Uterotonic akọkọ. Ti atony uterine ko ba dahun, ronu misoprostol, tranexamic acid (TXA), funmorawon uterine bimanual, ati MEDEVAC ti o yara.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / WHO PPH Guidelines
